---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in the voxbench harness (evaluation CLI, fetch, splits)
title: "[bug] <short description>"
labels: bug
---

## What went wrong
Expected vs actual behaviour.

## Reproduction
```bash
# command that triggered the bug
voxbench ...
```

## Environment
- `voxbench` version: output of `voxbench --version` or the commit SHA you installed from
- Python version:
- OS:
- Upstream corpus + version you were fetching (if applicable):

## What you have tried
Anything that worked around it, or anything that ruled out a likely cause.
